items.title: Start Here: Why AI-Assisted Development Needs a Governance Layer
items.description:
Every major shift in software engineering produces a new infrastructure requirement. The cloud era gave us orchestration. The DevOps era gave us CI/CD. The generative AI era is producing its own requirement — and most teams haven't named it yet.

That unnamed requirement is governance.

items.title: rotateX()

items.title: rotateY()
items.description: The rotateY() function rotates an element around its vertical y-axis. rotateY() originally handwritten and published with love on CSS-Tricks. You should really get the newsletter as well.

items.title: rotateZ()
items.description: The rotateZ() function rotates an element around its z-axis, so clockwise or counterclockwise. rotateZ() originally handwritten and published with love on CSS-Tricks. You should really get the newsletter as well.

items.title: rotate()
